1838120.name: SIMULSAGA: DATA_BREAK
1838120.description:
SIMULSAGA: DATA_BREAK is a darkly humorous horror RPG. You play as an office drone who lives a seemingly ordinary life, but something isn't right... A mysterious stranger will soon set into motion a series of events that gradually reveal the horrifying truth...

Inspirations include Earthbound, Undertale, One Shot and LISA: The Painful.

Features

  • Experience a mundane existence in game, as well as in real life!

  • Get showered, go to work, eat, sleep!

  • A PLAYABLE TOILET!

  • Beat or befriend foes like spiders, the elderly, teens, someone that definitely isn't Mickey Mouse, your boss, and more.

  • Lots of choices, and some that will bite you in the *** later!

  • Care for your cat. Or not because you are heartless POS.

  • An awesome original and authentic 8-bit soundtrack

  • Lots of jokes, references and Easter eggs

  • Short but sweet, with several endings - Expect the length of a long movie for an average playthough. For 100% completion up to 10 hours

  • Learn the meaning of life*

*you might not learn the meaning of life.
1838120.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
